summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Visual Storytelling Weekend experience update. All features working correctly: €350 pricing, weekend format, alternating Marrakech/Agadir calendar, track selection (Film/Photo/Drone), and booking flow. Fixed critical backend bug where /api/experiences endpoint was returning 500 error due to Pydantic model validation issue.

fixed.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - Experience Pydantic model required 'pricing' field but data used 'price'
fixed.fix: Updated Experience model in server.py to make pricing optional and add price, pricePerWeek, format, duration, schedule, maxParticipants, calendar fields as optional

passed_tests: Backend: Calendar has alternating Marrakech/Agadir pattern (weekend_1: Marrakech, weekend_2: Agadir, weekend_3: Marrakech, weekend_4: Agadir)
Backend: Three tracks available (filmmaking, photography, drone)
Backend: Destinations include Marrakech and Agadir
Backend: Contact/booking API works for Visual Storytelling
Frontend: Visual Storytelling page loads with 'Weekend Experience' badge
Frontend: €350 price displayed in 'Tarif Weekend' section
Frontend: Track selection works (Filmmaking, Photography, Drone)
Frontend: Weekend calendar shows alternating cities
Frontend: Booking flow shows only 'weekend' duration option
Frontend: Booking summary shows €350 total price
Frontend: /experiences page shows Visual Storytelling Weekend card with '3 jours / 2 nuits' tagline
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed Experience Pydantic model to support new weekend format fields
/app/backend/tests/test_visual_storytelling.py - Created new test file for Visual Storytelling
seed_data_creation: None - all data is hardcoded in server.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual Storytelling experience has been updated to weekend format at €350. The Experience Pydantic model was updated to support optional fields for the new format. All APIs and frontend features are working correctly.
mocked_api_note: All experience data is HARDCODED in /app/backend/server.py - no database used for experiences
